ISqlWizardConfigurationGetWhereClauseAsync Method

One Identity Manager API Server
Returns the WHERE clause corresponding to the expression tree.

Namespace:  QBM.CompositionApi.DataSources.SqlWizard
Assembly:  QBM.CompositionApi.Server (in QBM.CompositionApi.Server.dll) Version: 9.3 v93-311513

C#
Copy

	string tableName,
	SqlExpression expr,
	CancellationToken ct = null
